usage.accent: Primary CTAs (Text to get started), Key highlights

buttons.primary: bg-accent text-white hover:bg-accent/90 rounded-md px-8 py-4 font-bold shadow-lg transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-white rounded-md px-8 py-4 font-bold transition-colors
buttons.cta_special: Fixed/Sticky 'Text to get started' button on mobile

cards.service_card: bg-white p-8 border border-border hover:border-secondary/50 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-xl group relative overflow-hidden

navigation.style: Floating glassmorphism or Solid White with bottom border

visual_enhancers.decorations: Architectural line drawings (SVG) in background, 'Light' leaks (gradients) for faith aspect
visual_enhancers.motion: Fade-in up for sections, Staggered reveal for lists, Parallax on hero image

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Playfair Display' from Google Fonts for all Headings to give a 'Faith/Family' warmth.
Use 'Manrope' for body text to keep it modern and legible.
Implement a 'Text to get started' CTA that is always visible or very prominent.
Use the 'Bento Grid' layout for the Services section.
Ensure the 'About Erik' section feels personal - use the 'working hands' image if no portrait is available.
Do NOT use generic blue/white construction themes. Use the Warm Stone/Navy/Amber palette.
Add a subtle 'grain' texture to the background to make it feel physical/grounded.
For the 'Faith' aspect, use light and whitespace, not religious icons. Let the 'Jireh' name and mission statement do the work.
universal_guidelines: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
